channel.title: rog0x Blog — MCP Servers, AI Prompts, Developer Productivity
channel.description: Guides and tutorials on MCP servers, AI prompts for developers, Notion templates, and automation workflows.

item.title: How to Set Up MCP Servers in Claude Code: Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to installing and configuring MCP servers in Claude Code and Claude Desktop.

item.title: AI Prompt Engineering for Developers: Complete Guide 2026
item.description: Master prompt engineering for software development. 5 core patterns, developer-specific templates.

item.title: 15 Best Notion Templates for Developers in 2026
item.description: Developer hub, freelancer OS, project manager, interview prep, and more.

item.title: How We Built 67 Products in One Day with AI
item.description: How one developer used Claude Code to build 30 MCP servers, 14 prompt packs, 21 Notion templates, 2 SaaS products, and 42 blog posts.

item.title: 50 Articles, 70+ Products, One Session: The rog0x Story
item.description: How we built 31 MCP servers, 15 prompt packs, 22 Notion templates, 2 SaaS products, and 50 blog posts in one session.

item.title: Install Any MCP Server in 10 Seconds: The npx Guide
item.description: Install MCP servers for Claude Code with one command. npx @rog0x/mcp-web-tools and 24 more.

item.title: The Complete Developer Toolkit: 32 MCP Servers + 15 Prompt Packs + 27 Templates
item.description: Everything a developer needs in one place: 32 free MCP servers, 15 prompt packs, 27 Notion templates, 2 SaaS tools.

item.title: AI Task Management with MCP: Priority, Estimation, Standup, Burndown
item.description: MCP tools for task management: RICE/Eisenhower prioritization, PERT time estimation, auto standup generation.

item.title: Webhook Development Guide: Testing, Signatures, and Retry Logic
item.description: Complete guide to webhooks: send, receive, validate signatures, handle retries.

item.title: Why Pay for AI Prompts When ChatGPT Is Free?
item.description: Why professional prompt packs save time and money. The difference between generic AI output and structured results.

item.title: 14 AI Prompt Packs: 490+ Prompts for Every Developer Role
item.description: Complete overview of 14 prompt packs covering development, automation, freelancing, data science, DevOps, and more.

item.title: 30 AI Prompts for API Development
item.description: AI prompts for backend developers: REST API design, JWT authentication, database optimization, API testing.

item.title: AI Prompts for Startup Operations
item.description: AI prompts for startup founders: hiring, legal docs, financial models, customer onboarding, launches.

item.title: Manage Dependencies with AI
item.description: AI tools for dependency management: licenses, outdated packages, dependency trees, security audit.

item.title: Free Status Page for Your Website
item.description: Free status page that monitors your website uptime and response time. No credit card required.

item.title: Free URL Shortener with Analytics
item.description: Free URL shortener with click tracking. Shorten links, view click stats, no account needed.

item.title: There's a Notion Template for That: 22 Templates for Every Part of Life
item.description: 22 Notion templates covering work, health, finance, education, creativity, relationships, and more.

item.title: Run Your Small Business From Notion
item.description: Notion template for small business: client CRM, project management, invoicing, revenue tracking.

item.title: Manage Social Media in Notion
item.description: Content calendar, post database, hashtag library, analytics tracking in Notion.

item.title: The Simplest CRM: Track Contacts and Deals in Notion
item.description: Simple Notion CRM for solopreneurs: contacts, deal pipeline, activity log, follow-up reminders.

item.title: Plan Any Event in Notion
item.description: Notion event planning template: guest RSVP, vendors, schedule, budget, checklists.

item.title: Learn a Language with Notion
item.description: Vocabulary with spaced repetition, grammar notes, study sessions, resources, level tracking.

item.title: Track Car Maintenance in Notion
item.description: Maintenance log, fuel log with MPG calculator, total expenses, insurance documents. Multi-car support.

item.title: Start a Gratitude Journal in Notion
item.description: Daily entries, mood tracking, 100+ prompts, weekly reviews. 5 minutes a day for better wellbeing.
